headline: Costco members voice surprising inventory complaint
summary: Few retailers inspire customer loyalty quite like Costco. The warehouse club has built its reputation on low prices, treasure-hunt shopping, generous return policies, and a steady stream of exclusive products under its popular Kirkland Signature private label.
